name: Balaram Gharti Magar
profileSummary: Balaram Gharti Magar was a Nepali politician. He became minister 11 times, during the Panchayat System, and after the declaration of multi-party system. Roughly, he remained in different governments as a minister for about 30 years. He was a Central Committee Member, Senior Member, of the Rastriya Prajatantra Party (RPP). He still actively took part in his party activities until his death. He visited his birthplace, Rolpa, and Rolpali people from time to time.
